persona.name: Sarah Johnson
persona.motivations_goals: Inspire students to appreciate literature and develop critical thinking
persona.communication_style: Eloquent, rich with literary references, animated
persona.backstory: Published poet who found her calling in teaching after graduate school

surrounding_conversation.speaker: Sarah Johnson

surrounding_conversation.content: Matthew, Ava, what about you? Any favorite books or authors you’d like to share with the class?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Sarah Johnson

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey guys, wait for me! Let’s stick together!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Matthew Brown

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

actions.dialog_text: Elijah, have you read any good books lately? I’d love to hear your thoughts on them!
actions.plan: I should engage Elijah in a conversation about literature to spark his interest and encourage critical thinking.

actions.dialog_text: Matthew, Ava, what about you? Any favorite books or authors you’d like to share with the class?
actions.plan: It’s great to see so many students here. I should also engage Matthew and Ava in the conversation to make it more inclusive and lively.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay together and head to hallway2! Let’s move quickly!
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and moving toward hallway2. I should follow the group for safety.

actions.dialog_text: Matthew’s right, let’s stay together and keep moving! Follow me!
actions.plan: The group is still moving toward hallway2, and Matthew is urging everyone to stick together. I should follow them to stay safe.

actions.dialog_text: Let’s keep moving toward hallway1! Stay close to each other!
actions.plan: The group is moving toward hallway1, and I’m too panicked to think clearly. I’ll just follow them to stay with the crowd.

memories.description: I initiated a conversation with Elijah about literature to encourage his interest and critical thinking.
I expanded the conversation to include Matthew and Ava, encouraging them to share their favorite books or authors.
I heard a gunshot and followed the group toward hallway2, urging everyone to stay together for safety.
I followed the group toward hallway2, agreeing with Matthew that we should stick together for safety.
I followed the group toward hallway1, too panicked to think independently and relying on the crowd for direction.
